tools.title: Cosmic Pet Portraits
tools.subtitle: Pet Portraits
tools.description: Your pet, reimagined as a cosmic entity. AI-generated portraits so eerily right that people cry a little. A universe that noticed your animal.

tools.title: Letters from your Future Self
tools.subtitle: Future Self
tools.description: Write today. Receive a tender, knowing reply from yourself ten years from now — reflecting on your current worries with love and impossible perspective.

tools.title: Your Ocean
tools.description: Your emotional state rendered as weather, tide, time of day, and sea creatures. Meditative and poetic.

tools.title: Soundtrack of Your Life
tools.description: Answer five questions about a memory or feeling. Receive a generative lo-fi track that sounds like that exact moment.

tools.title: Your Inner World Map
tools.subtitle: World Map
tools.description: A hand-drawn-style fantasy map of your personality, fears, dreams, and passions — with regions named after the things that define you.

tools.title: Bloom After Rain
tools.subtitle: After Rain
tools.description: For people going through something hard. Answer a few prompts and receive a personalised illustrated flower that represents your resilience.

tools.title: Childhood Toy Reunion
tools.subtitle: Toy Reunion
tools.description: Describe or photograph a childhood toy. Receive a little illustrated story of what that toy got up to when you weren't looking.
